ir_specs.statement: To change the niceness of an existing process, one needs to use the renice command.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: To change the niceness of an existing process, one needs to use the renice command.

ir_specs.statement: The program accepts the following option.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The program accepts the following option.

ir_specs.statement: Add adjustment instead of 10 to the command’s niceness.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Add adjustment instead of 10 to the command’s niceness.

ir_specs.statement: If adjustment is negative and you lack appropriate privileges, nice issues a warning but otherwise acts as if you specified a zero adjustment.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If adjustment is negative and you lack appropriate privileges, nice issues a warning but otherwise acts as if you specified a zero adjustment.

ir_specs.statement: For compatibility nice also supports an obsolete option syntax - adjustment .
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: For compatibility nice also supports an obsolete option syntax - adjustment .

ir_specs.statement: New scripts should use -n adjustment instead.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: New scripts should use -n adjustment instead.

ir_specs.statement: nice is installed only on systems that have the POSIX setpriority function, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence on non-POSIX platforms.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: nice is installed only on systems that have the POSIX setpriority function, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence on non-POSIX platforms.

ir_specs.statement: It is sometimes useful to run a non-interactive program with reduced niceness.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: It is sometimes useful to run a non-interactive program with reduced niceness.

ir_specs.statement: Since nice prints the current niceness, you can invoke it through itself to demonstrate how it works.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Since nice prints the current niceness, you can invoke it through itself to demonstrate how it works.

ir_specs.statement: The default behavior is to increase the niceness by ‘ 10 ’:.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The default behavior is to increase the niceness by ‘ 10 ’:.

ir_specs.statement: The adjustment is relative to the current niceness.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The adjustment is relative to the current niceness.

ir_specs.statement: In the next example, the first nice invocation runs the second one with niceness 10, and it in turn runs the final one with a niceness that is 3 more:.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: In the next example, the first nice invocation runs the second one with niceness 10, and it in turn runs the final one with a niceness that is 3 more:.

ir_specs.statement: Specifying a niceness larger than the supported range is the same as specifying the maximum supported value:.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Specifying a niceness larger than the supported range is the same as specifying the maximum supported value:.

ir_specs.statement: Only a privileged user may run a process with lower niceness:.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Only a privileged user may run a process with lower niceness:.

ir_specs.statement: nohup runs the given command with hangup signals ignored, so that the command can continue running in the background after you log out.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: nohup runs the given command with hangup signals ignored, so that the command can continue running in the background after you log out.
